title: surface-opt P9 — dashboard Command Center
summary: This feature delivery ships a read-only dashboard Command Center. The default view renders one 9-stage grid and a run-event timeline per active feature-delivery task. A server-side aggregation layer at GET /api/run-state discovers non-terminal runs under .pan/work/, prefers pnpm -w exec pan status <taskId> --format…
planning_context: handoff.handoff_note: Index links delivery report, active work artifacts, and implementation surface. After human acceptance, run pan advance with the feature index artifact to transition to complete.
review.spec_contracts_note: No contracts/ directory under feature folder; review used behavioral delta coverage only.
intake.human_approval_note: Spec ratified at plan advance per state.json advanceHistory intake→plan event.
archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
